summary: Conservative board profile for an STM32F103RBT6 training platform.
notes: This profile intentionally keeps pin assumptions conservative because board-level fixed wiring differs across training kits and expansion boards.
Use explicit module pin options when your real training board has fixed LED, key, RTC, ADC, buzzer, or display wiring.
STM32F103RBT6 has been widely used on older embedded training platforms, while many newer boards have moved to STM32G431RBT6.
sources: Legacy STM32F103RBT6 embedded training platform references
Training material sets that include both STM32F103RBT6 and STM32G431RBT6 startup references
